title: D.A.Y. Republic Classic Snap Card Game Cute Design Styles, Matching Pairs Game, Family Games, Great Memory Boosting Activity and Ideal Screen Free Fun
features: 🃏⛵🍰🍌 HIGH QUALITY SNAP CARDS IN GIFT TINS - These premium quality snap card decks are sure to give you and your kids endless hours of entertainment and screen free time. Each pack contains 36 heavy duty coated cards. These durable cards are resistant to rips and dents. These snap cards are also ideal as party bag fillers. Each card measures 8.5cm X 5.5cm / 3.4”x 2.6” making these games perfect for travel

🃏⛵🍰🍌 IDEAL GAME FOR CREATIVE LEARNING - Each card has an easily identifiable picture they would be great to teach new words to children and English through visual learning. The cards are also a great way to improve your hand eye coordination and reaction speed. Recommended age 3+

🃏⛵🍰🍌 HOW TO PLAY SNAP GAMES - The game is designed to be played with 2-4 people. One person slowly lays the cards down and if two of the same cards are played on top of each other then it’s a race for the person to say snap!! Whoever is first wins the round

🃏⛵🍰🍌 SCREEN-FREE EDUCATIONAL FUN - Educational cards that cultivate conversation, socialisation, and skill-building while developing essential skills. Helps in matching skills, reaction time and object recognition. Stimulates motor skills, dexterity and academic skills. Improves problem-solving abilities and academic skills
description: Product Description Terrific Travel Sized Game Ideal for on-the-go entertainment, these cards are suitably sized for travel. Slip them into your bag or pocket, and you'll have a portable game ready for fun wherever you are. The compact design makes these playing cards a fantastic companion for day trips, holidays or a game night with friends! Gorgeous Designs Each of the 36 fun playing cards in this set features adorable illustrations, bringing a delightful new element to the traditional Snap game. The cute designs not only make gameplay engaging but also add an extra layer of enjoyment, making it perfect for players of all ages. Super Fun Snap Game! This set of Snap Playing Cards is a delightful twist on the classic card game and has been designed for hours of entertainment and memory-boosting fun. This set not only brings you the joy of a matching pairs game but also offers cute and charming design styles )including teddy bears, sailboats, birthday cakes, butterflies, fruit bunches and much more) that add a touch of charm to your gaming experience. Snap is an ideal activity for boosting memory and concentration. Whether you're playing with friends or family, the game promises an interactive and screen-free way to have fun and make lasting memories whilst sharpening your mind!
